data.name: Xastur Spa: Erotic Salon Tycoon
data.detailed_description:
In XasturSpa, you play as a small business owner running your very own spa.
Provide relaxing massages, refreshing showers, and luxurious pedicure treatments to your beautiful female customers. They love your services so much, they enjoy them fully nude.

Grow your reputation, expand your spa, and open new franchise locations to build a true wellness empire!

 

Shower

Use high-quality body care products for your customers.

You can serve 1–3 customers at the same time in the shower area.

 

Massage

Give relaxing massages—your customers will react with cute, happy sounds when they enjoy it.

 

Pedicure

Create stylish pedicures for your customers' lovely feet.

 

Main Goal

When starting your business, your dream was to build a spa empire.

Your first big milestone is to earn $10,000 to open your next spa location.

But remember: some orders will require extra furniture or items, so invest wisely to grow your profits!

data.short_description: In XasturSpa, you run a small spa business. Offer massages, showers, and pedicures to beautiful female customers who enjoy the treatments nude. Grow your reputation, earn money, and expand your spa into a successful franchise!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 羅馬尼亞文, 烏克蘭文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Dual-Core Intel i5 CPU @ 2GHz+
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel 4xxx Series w/ 512MB VRAM or better
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i7 CPU @ 2.6GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GTX 555 w/ 1GB VRAM or better
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.9.3
  • 處理器: Core i5 @ 2.2GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 5000
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.9.3
  • 處理器: Core i7 @ 2.7GHz+
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated standalone GPU w/ 1GB+ VRAM
